commits.summary: Open slice G6 — LIVE_SAFE_STRATEGIES typed frozenset + boot assert
Slice G6 RED — LIVE_SAFE_STRATEGIES antibody (8 tests, all failing)
Slice G6 GREEN — wire LIVE_SAFE_STRATEGIES into live boot

post_review_amendments.trigger: con-nyx adversarial review 2026-04-26 — 1 BLOCKER + 4 MAJOR + 3 MINOR

BLOCKER_1_resolved.finding: Boot guard at src/main.py:491-492 read pre-hydration _control_state (empty dict at module load); is_strategy_enabled() default-True semantic meant SystemExit fired unconditionally even when operator had set gates via control_plane set_strategy_gate.
BLOCKER_1_resolved.fix_path: Path 1 (recommended) — extract _assert_live_safe_strategies_or_exit() helper that calls refresh_control_state() before composing the enabled set. Reorder boot to invoke the guard AFTER init_schema(conn) + conn.close(), so the control_overrides table exists when refresh reads from it.
BLOCKER_1_resolved.verification: Empirical: tests/test_live_safe_strategies.py::test_boot_helper_refuses_when_unsafe_strategy_enabled (hydrated + center_buy enabled → SystemExit fires) + test_boot_helper_silent_when_only_safe_strategy_enabled (hydrated + only opening_inertia → silent) + test_boot_helper_with_cold_cache_refuses_via_default_true_semantic (cold-cache contract pin). Reproduced con-nyx's empirical scenario directly via Python in worktree post-fix; cold-cache still refuses (now intentionally, per docs).

MAJOR_1_resolved.finding: Test #8 was a string-grep, not an integration test. Allowed BLOCKER #1 to slip past.
MAJOR_1_resolved.fix: Added 3 boot-integration tests (#9-11) that exercise the production composition path with monkeypatched _control_state. Cold-cache scenario explicitly pinned.

post_review_amendments.MAJOR_2_followup: KNOWN_STRATEGIES drift surface count is 3 (cycle_runner.py / strategy_tracker.py / portfolio.py literals). Test #3 covers only cycle_runner. Followup: canonicalize to src/types/strategy_identity.py (Fitz K<<N pattern, mirror metric_identity.py). Captured in followups_owed.
post_review_amendments.MAJOR_3_followup: scripts/live_smoke_test.py is a ZEUS_MODE=live boot-bypass channel (calls PolymarketClient directly, never invokes main()). Currently low-risk (only $0.01 BUY+CANCEL on TEST_TOKEN_ID) but inheritable via copy-paste. Followup: document the carve-out in operator runbook OR add LIVE_SAFE_STRATEGIES_ASSERTED() shim required by all live-mode scripts.
post_review_amendments.MAJOR_4_partial_addressed: Receipt amended below to articulate actual operator-visible behavior post-fix (DB read + gate composition + guard, in that order). DB-fault-path hardening (refresh_control_state's query_error branch leaving strategy_gates={}) deferred to followup.

operator_visible_breaking_change_AMENDED.applies_when: ZEUS_MODE=live AND any of {settlement_capture, shoulder_sell, center_buy} is enabled (default state on a fresh DB with no control_overrides rows)
actual_runtime_sequence: 3. get_world_connection() + init_schema(conn) (existing — required to ensure control_overrides table exists).

7. NEW: _assert_live_safe_strategies_or_exit() — internally calls refresh_control_state() which opens its own connection, reads control_overrides, populates _control_state['strategy_gates']; then composes enabled set from KNOWN_STRATEGIES ∩ is_strategy_enabled(); then delegates to assert_live_safe_strategies_under_live_mode.
operator_visible_breaking_change_AMENDED.remediation: Operator must explicitly disable each non-allowlisted strategy via control_plane set_strategy_gate. The disable command writes to control_overrides; the next boot's refresh_control_state() reads it; the guard then sees opening_inertia as the only enabled strategy and passes silently.
operator_visible_breaking_change_AMENDED.AMENDED_FROM_PRE_REVIEW: Pre-review framing said 'Daemon refuses to launch with FATAL exit message naming offending strategies'. Post-review correction: this is now true. Pre-fix, the daemon refused REGARDLESS of operator action because the gate state was never hydrated before the guard ran (con-nyx BLOCKER #1).

regression_panel.method: stash-test confirmed identical baseline pre/post GREEN

operator_visible_breaking_change.applies_when: ZEUS_MODE=live AND any of {settlement_capture, shoulder_sell, center_buy} is enabled (default state)
operator_visible_breaking_change.behavior: Daemon refuses to launch with FATAL exit message naming offending strategies
operator_visible_breaking_change.remediation: Operator must explicitly disable each non-allowlisted strategy via control_plane set_strategy_gate before relaunching live daemon
operator_visible_breaking_change.rationale: Workbook G6 acceptance — 'Live boot raises if any non-allowlisted strategy reaches discovery'. Today only opening_inertia is operator-approved for live execution.

followups_owed.summary: LIVE_SAFE_CITIES typed frozenset + executor.py pre-CLOB assertion (same pattern as G6)
followups_owed.gating: Wait for zeus-pr18-fix-plan-20260426 to merge (executor.py overlap)

followups_owed.summary: Canonicalize KNOWN_STRATEGIES to src/types/strategy_identity.py (Fitz K<<N pattern; mirror metric_identity.py). Replace 3 drift surfaces (cycle_runner.py / strategy_tracker.py / portfolio.py) with single import.

scripts/live_smoke_test.py is a ZEUS_MODE=live boot-bypass channel (calls PolymarketClient directly). Either (a) add LIVE_SAFE_STRATEGIES_ASSERTED() shim required by all live-mode scripts + counter-test, or (b) document the carve-out in operator runbook.

refresh_control_state's query_error branch (control_plane.py:225-228) leaves strategy_gates={}, which after the BLOCKER #1 fix means a transient DB hiccup at boot still produces refusal. Either populate gates from a prior-persisted view in the error path, or document fail-closed-on-DB-fault as intentional.

lore_extraction_recommendation: Pattern reusable for G7. If a third typed-allowlist arrives, extract a shared 'live-allowlist boot guard' helper to architecture/. Until then, copy-paste cost < abstraction cost.
